v2_to_v3_delta_notes: v3 same-state enforcement + jaccard floor 0.70 same-state / 0.85 cross-state + single-facility-first ordering + expanded CROSS_STATE_SYSTEM_SUBSTRINGS allowlist. Eliminated ~$1.3B of v2 false-positive cross-state allocations (e.g., Cleveland UH EIN allocated to 15 unrelated AMCs). Trade-off: fewer matched filers (1,384 vs v2's 2,047), more fallback share (54.1% vs v2's 32.4% by count). Vanderbilt, Duke, Cooper, NY Presbyterian, Indiana University Health now matched to their own correct EINs.
